name: NetworkAdministrator cannot write controls (net-admin group empty in v1)
hypothesis: "Administrator" does NOT imply "can write controls": NetworkAdministratorSunSpec's only write grant is the net-admin point group, which is deliberately empty in v1 (regmap.GroupNetAdmin) and compiles to zero writable registers. A control write must be denied with exception 01, exactly like a read-only role.
expected: A WMaxLimPct write as NetworkAdministratorSunSpec returns Modbus exception 01 (Wrote=false); reads are unaffected.
fix: If a NetworkAdmin write is accepted, look at configs/rbac/rules.json (its rw grant is scoped to models:["net-admin"]) and internal/regmap/pointgroups.go (GroupNetAdmin must resolve to zero intervals). A non-empty net-admin group would silently grant admin writes.
notes: This is the non-obvious cell of the role-denial matrix, pinned here as reviewable data alongside the Go matrix sweep (authz-role-denial-matrix).
